name: Chipotle Rubbed Cowboy Steak with Jalapeno Jelly
recipeIngredient: 24 ounces prime bone-in short tail ribeye
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the chipotle paste over the steak, thinly covering it. Refrigerate for at least 4 hours, tightly covered.
2. Over hot heat, grill the steak for 10 minutes on one side and 8 minutes on the other.
3. Slather the jelly on the meat and allow to rest for 5 minutes before serving.
